experience.title: Information Technology Specialist
experience.description: Defines scope, plans and deliverables for assigned projects. Coordinates and collaborates with others in analyzing collected requirements to ensure plans and identified solutions meet customer needs and expectations.
Protected U.S. diplomats while visiting foreign dignitaries for diplomatic missions. Maintained security awareness in a federal environment.

experience.title: Information Technology Interpreter
experience.description: Assisted United States military in training foreign nationals on information technology. Diagnosed computer errors and provided technical support.
